nodes.label: Home Screen — Active Session with Protection ON and Scheduled Ritual
nodes.description: Home in active state with app protection enabled. Status bar shows 'PROTECCIÓN ACTIVA / 3 apps fuera de tu mente' + Descanso button (top right). Blocked apps shown as pills: Instagram ×, TikTok ×, YouTube ×. Main card: circular timer showing '13:56' large, 'RECUPERASTE' label above, 'quedan 31:04' below. Session stats: 'de 45 min · 13 min de claridad'. Red 'Finalizar sesión'. Below: 'Tu ritual de hoy — Sin rutinas — agrega las que quieres practicar' + 'Configurar rutinas del ritual' card (Meditación, respiración, movimiento y más). Section 'Mi aprendizaje del día' at bottom.

nodes.label: Protection Active Strip — Blocked Apps Pills
nodes.description: Top strip in active+protected state showing 'PROTECCIÓN ACTIVA / 3 apps fuera de tu mente' on left, 'Descanso' button on right. Below: removable pills for each blocked app (Instagram ×, TikTok ×, YouTube ×). Visually confirms active blocking. Descanso may pause protection for a break.

nodes.label: Session Timer Card — Recovery Label Variant
nodes.description: Timer card in active view shows 'RECUPERASTE' label above the main countdown (13:56), 'quedan 31:04' below. This variant suggests the timer entered a recovery/clarity phase. 45 min total session, 13 min de claridad achieved. Circular teal progress arc.

nodes.label: Configure Ritual Card — Empty Ritual State CTA
nodes.description: Card shown under 'Tu ritual de hoy' when user has no routines configured. Shows + icon, 'Configurar rutinas del ritual' title, subtitle 'Meditación, respiración, movimiento y más', arrow chevron. Onboarding/empty-state CTA to set up session rituals.

nodes.label: Descanso (Break) Button — Protection Pause CTA
nodes.description: Button labeled 'Descanso' appearing in the protection active strip when session is running. Allows user to take a break, likely pausing app-blocking protection temporarily. Appears top-right of protection strip.
